description: Accounts in Arabic script which list monies (given in Greek/Coptic numerals) owed to (ʿinda) various people, such as Ḥayyim (حايم), Makārim, Yūsuf, Maḥāsin, Abū l-Faraj, Ibrāhīm, Mukhliṣ, Abū ʿAlī, Khalaf, Barakāt, Ḥasūn, Bū Saʿd, Hilāl, and Mūsā. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
